features: 40W USB Plug Fast Charger- Upgraded charger plug with a Power Delivery and a Quick Charge 3.0 port to Charge iPhone 16 15 14 Series models up to 3 times faster than original 5W Charger with full 20W power.

Multiport Charger Plug: Saqykan usb plug uk with 4-Ports (dual ports USB C +dual ports USB A) can fast charge 4 devices simultaneously at up to 40W. Choosing Saqykan multiport fast charger plug minimize waiting time and frees you from messy chargers with various interfaces.

Safe and Reliable- Saqykan c type charger plug built-in safeguards protect your devices against excessive current, overheating, and overcharging.The USB C Plug is made of ABS + PC fireproof material,ensuring that your digital device always charges safely.

Compact Design - Incredibly compact size for enhanced portability. With its sleek design and 100-240 volt input, this charging plug is your ultimate companion for travel. Its compact size, appealing color, and stylish look make it a must-have travel accessory.

Universal Compatibility - Saqykan Charger Plug with Dual Port USB-C and Dual Port USB-A Compatible with iPhone Air/ iPhone17 /17 Pro/17 Pro Max/ iPhone 16/16 Plus/16 Pro/16 Pro Max/iPhone 15/15 Plus/15 Pro/15 Pro Max/iPhone 14/14 Plus/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/13/13 Mini/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/12/12 Mini/12 Pro/12 Pro Max/11/ 11 Pro/11 Pro Max/XS Max/XS/XR /X/8/8 Plus/7/7 Plus/6/6S/SE/, iPad Pro/ Air /Mini , Apple watch series, Samsung Galaxy S26/S25/S24/S23/S22/S21/S21+/S21 Ultra/ S20/ S20 Ultra/S20 FE, Note Series, Galaxy Z Fold Series, A15/A16/A25/A26/A35/A36/A45/A55/A56 and more A series, Tab S7/S7+/S8/S8+, LG, Google Pixel and more devices
